data.name: Milfylicious - Chapter I
data.detailed_description:
Dive into a web of secret societies, inheritance drama, and steamy interactions as you navigate choices that shape relationships and unlock new secrets.

Milfylicious offers an immersive and highly customizable adult experience you won’t want to miss.

Step into the shoes of the Young Master, heir to the enigmatic Starmount estate, and explore a decadent world of pleasure, power, and mystery. Every decision you make affects your standing with the alluring women around you, leading to unique erotic encounters and thrilling story twists.

As you step into this world of luxury and secrecy, you’ll find yourself surrounded by a captivating all-female staff, each with her own ambitions, desires, and secrets to uncover.

Indulge your fantasies and uncover the secrets of Starmount—if you dare.

What are you waiting for, take your inheritance and enjoy the forbidden pleasures that await.
data.about_the_game:
Dive into a web of secret societies, inheritance drama, and steamy interactions as you navigate choices that shape relationships and unlock new secrets.

Milfylicious offers an immersive and highly customizable adult experience you won’t want to miss.

Step into the shoes of the Young Master, heir to the enigmatic Starmount estate, and explore a decadent world of pleasure, power, and mystery. Every decision you make affects your standing with the alluring women around you, leading to unique erotic encounters and thrilling story twists.

As you step into this world of luxury and secrecy, you’ll find yourself surrounded by a captivating all-female staff, each with her own ambitions, desires, and secrets to uncover.

Indulge your fantasies and uncover the secrets of Starmount—if you dare.

What are you waiting for, take your inheritance and enjoy the forbidden pleasures that await.
data.short_description: Milfylicious is a Mature Visual Novel that features numerous steamy scenarios, accompanied by sultry jazz music, voice acting and realistic adult sound effects. Additionally, players have the option to view their beloved ladies in a realistic representation.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 德文, 簡體中文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 1 Ghz
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX or OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 9 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6-10.14
  • 處理器: 1 Ghz
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX or OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 9 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: Game is non-notarized. May not work with 10.15 Catalina

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu / SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1 Ghz
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX or OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 9 GB 可用空間

Minimum:

  • OS: Windows 10
  • Processor: 1 Ghz
  • Memory: 512 MB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX or OpenGL compatible card
  • Storage: 9 GB available space

Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system

mac_requirements.minimum:

  • OS: Mac OS X 10.6-10.14
  • Processor: 1 Ghz
  • Memory: 512 MB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX or OpenGL compatible card
  • Storage: 9 GB available space
  • Additional Notes: Game is non-notarized. May not work with 10.15 Catalina

Minimum:
  • OS: Ubuntu / SteamOS
  • Processor: 1 Ghz
